description_for_human: Disposable email service with automatic OTP/verification code extraction. Generate temporary emails and get verification codes instantly.
description_for_model: A disposable email service. Use this when you need a temporary email address for sign-ups, verifications, or testing. You can generate emails, receive messages, and extract OTP/verification codes programmatically. Two modes: (1) JavaScript API via window.TempMailAPI, (2) URL parameters like ?api=generate, ?api=otp&address=x, ?api=wait&address=x&t=60.
